title: brachyglottis repanda var. rangiora
intro: Brachyglottis repanda var. rangiora, also known as Kawakawa or New Zealand Pepper Tree, is a plant native to New Zealand and is a variety of the Brachyglottis repanda species. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The Kawakawa plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing pain and inflammation, improving digestive health, and supporting immune function. Traditional herbal preparations of Kawakawa include infusions, tinctures, and topical applications, which can be used to treat a range of ailments and promote overall well-being.
